requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval — CITC Mandatory Certification and Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型式认可——CITC强制认证及标志
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型式認可——CITC強制認證及標誌

summary.en: The Communications, Space and Technology Commission (CITC) of Saudi Arabia requires mandatory type approval for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment before it may be imported, offered for sale, or used in Saudi Arabia. This covers Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, Z-Wave, cellular, and any wireless radio technology embedded in consumer IoT devices. The type approval process requires submission of technical documentation (test reports to applicable CITC technical specifications, frequency plans, output power data) and device samples to CITC or a CITC-accredited laboratory. Upon approval, CITC issues a type approval certificate valid for a defined period. The CITC mark must appear on the product label in Arabic and English before customs clearance is permitted. Products must operate on frequencies allocated under Saudi spectrum plans aligned with ITU Radio Regulations. Within the GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council), a GCC Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) allows a type approval from one GCC member state to be accepted by another GCC state — but this MRA applies only within GCC and does not extend to Chinese, US, or EU approvals. Chinese CCC certification is not recognized by CITC and does not satisfy CITC type approval requirements.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通信、航天与技术委员会（CITC）要求所有在沙特阿拉伯进口、销售或使用的无线电及电信终端设备在上市前须取得强制型式认可。涵盖嵌入消费类物联网设备的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窝网络及其他无线电技术。型式认可流程须向CITC或CITC认可实验室提交技术文件（按CITC技术规范的检测报告、频率计划、输出功率数据）及设备样品。审批通过后，CITC签发具有效期的型式认可证书。CITC标志须在清关前以阿拉伯语和英语标注于产品标签上。产品须在与ITU无线电规则接轨的沙特频谱计划分配的频率范围内运行。海湾合作委员会（GCC）内部存在GCC相互认可协议（MRA）——一个GCC成员国的型式认可可被另一GCC成员国接受——但该MRA仅限于GCC内部，不延伸至中国、美国或欧盟的审批。中国CCC认证不被CITC承认，不满足CITC型式认可要求。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通信、航天與技術委員會（CITC）要求所有在沙特阿拉伯進口、銷售或使用的無線電及電信終端設備在上市前須取得強制型式認可。涵蓋嵌入消費類物聯網設備的Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂巢網路及其他無線電技術。型式認可流程須向CITC或CITC認可實驗室提交技術文件（按CITC技術規範的檢測報告、頻率計劃、輸出功率數據）及設備樣品。審批通過後，CITC簽發具有效期的型式認可證書。CITC標誌須在清關前以阿拉伯語和英語標注於產品標籤上。產品須在與ITU無線電規則接軌的沙特頻譜計劃分配的頻率範圍內運行。海灣合作委員會（GCC）內部存在GCC相互認可協議（MRA）——一個GCC成員國的型式認可可被另一GCC成員國接受——但該MRA僅限於GCC內部，不延伸至中國、美國或歐盟的審批。中國CCC認證不被CITC承認，不滿足CITC型式認可要求。

standards_or_laws: Saudi Telecommunications Act and CITC By-Laws — legal basis for mandatory type approval of radio and telecom terminal equipment in Saudi Arabia
CITC Technical Specifications for Telecommunications Equipment — radio frequency parameters and technical requirements for type approval
GCC MRA on Telecommunications Terminal Equipment — mutual recognition among GCC member states (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE) only

summary.en: In China, radio transmitter equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, cellular) must obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, under MIIT) type approval before sale or import. The SRRC approval confirms that the device operates on permitted frequencies within allowed output power limits. Terminal equipment connecting to public telecommunications networks additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Testing is conducted by CAICT-accredited laboratories. For in-scope IT equipment with integrated radio, a CCC certification to GB 4943.1 or GB/T 9254 may also be required. Neither SRRC approval, NAL, nor CCC certification issued in China is recognized by CITC — completely separate CITC type approval must be obtained.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电发射设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee、蜂窝）在销售或进口前须取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，隶属工业和信息化部）型式核准，确认设备在允许频率范围内以允许功率限值运行。连接公共电信网络的终端设备还需取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。检测由CAICT认可实验室进行。对于属于CCC范围的集成无线电IT设备，还可能需要依据GB 4943.1或GB/T 9254取得CCC认证。中国颁发的SRRC审批、NAL及CCC认证均不被CITC承认——须向CITC单独取得型式认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電發射設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee、蜂巢）在銷售或進口前須取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，隸屬工業和信息化部）型式核准，確認設備在允許頻率範圍內以允許功率限值運行。連接公共電信網路的終端設備還需取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。檢測由CAICT認可實驗室進行。對於屬於CCC範圍的集成無線電IT設備，還可能需要依據GB 4943.1或GB/T 9254取得CCC認證。中國頒發的SRRC審批、NAL及CCC認證均不被CITC承認——須向CITC單獨取得型式認可。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Provisions on the Administration of Radio Frequency Allocation — SRRC type approval for radio transmitter equipment
MIIT Measures on Telecommunications Equipment Networking Access Verification — Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment, radio disturbance characteristics (EMC baseline linked to CCC scope)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval and MIIT Network Access License are not recognized by CITC. There is no bilateral mutual recognition agreement between China and Saudi Arabia for radio type approvals. A product lawfully sold in China under SRRC must obtain a completely separate CITC type approval certificate before import or sale in Saudi Arabia. The CITC mark in Arabic and English must appear on the product label — Chinese SRRC or CCC labels and markings do not satisfy this requirement. The GCC MRA covers only GCC member states and does not extend to China. Frequencies permitted under SRRC in China that are not allocated under CITC Saudi spectrum plans will require product frequency modification or redesign. Arabic labelling is mandatory on product and packaging.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型式核准和工信部网络接入许可不被CITC承认。中国与沙特阿拉伯之间无无线电型式认可双边互认协议。依据SRRC审批在中国合法销售的产品，须向CITC单独取得型式认可证书，方可在沙特阿拉伯进口或销售。CITC标志须以阿拉伯语和英语标注于产品标签上——中国SRRC或CCC标签和标志不满足此要求。GCC互认协议仅涵盖GCC成员国，不延伸至中国。SRRC在中国允许但CITC沙特频谱计划未分配的频率，需进行产品频率修改或重新设计。产品和包装强制要求阿拉伯语标注。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型式核准和工信部網路接入許可不被CITC承認。中國與沙特阿拉伯之間無無線電型式認可雙邊互認協議。依據SRRC審批在中國合法銷售的產品，須向CITC單獨取得型式認可證書，方可在沙特阿拉伯進口或銷售。CITC標誌須以阿拉伯語和英語標注於產品標籤上——中國SRRC或CCC標籤和標誌不滿足此要求。GCC互認協議僅涵蓋GCC成員國，不延伸至中國。SRRC在中國允許但CITC沙特頻譜計劃未分配的頻率，需進行產品頻率修改或重新設計。產品和包裝強制要求阿拉伯語標注。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CITC type approval certificate and CITC mark (Arabic and English) required on product label before import or sale in Saudi Arabia; enforced at customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval required for radio transmitter equipment; MIIT NAL required for telecom terminal equipment connecting to public networks

source.publisher: Communications, Space and Technology Commission (CITC), Saudi Arabia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CITC type approval is mandatory for all wireless devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT) before import or sale in Saudi Arabia. Chinese SRRC approval, CCC certification, and MIIT NAL are not accepted by CITC. A separate CITC type approval certificate must be obtained, the CITC mark displayed on the label in Arabic and English, and an authorized Saudi in-country agent appointed for the CITC registration process. The GCC MRA applies only within GCC member states and does not extend to China.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CITC型式认可是所有无线设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网）在进口或于沙特阿拉伯销售前的强制要求。中国SRRC审批、CCC认证和工信部NAL不被CITC接受。须单独取得CITC型式认可证书，在标签上以阿拉伯语和英语标注CITC标志，并为CITC注册流程委任沙特境内授权代理。GCC互认协议仅适用于GCC成员国，不延伸至中国。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CITC型式認可是所有無線設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢、物聯網）在進口或於沙特阿拉伯銷售前的強制要求。中國SRRC審批、CCC認證和工信部NAL不被CITC接受。須單獨取得CITC型式認可證書，在標籤上以阿拉伯語和英語標注CITC標誌，並為CITC注冊流程委任沙特境內授權代理。GCC互認協議僅適用於GCC成員國，不延伸至中國。
